description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests-dev-preview that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job with a Couchbase service, then configure core dump capturing, install build environment, check out the repository with submodules, set up Ruby 2.6, install dependencies with bundle, initialize Couchbase, compile an extension, display a library version, check Couchbase, run tests with a 15-minute timeout, and display core dumps if tests fail.
